ham.subject: Bank Alert: Recent Transaction on Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a recent transaction on your bank account ending in 1234. The transaction details are as follows:

Date: 2026-04-15
Amount: INR 5,000.00
Merchant: ABC Retail Pvt. Ltd.

If you recognize this transaction, no action is required. If you do not recognize this activity, please contact our customer support immediately at <URL> or call 1800-123-456.

Thank you for banking with us.

Regards,
Your Bank Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Pay Missed Delivery Fee for Your FedEx Package
